prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to the regulatory judgment of Fairhive Homes Limited, a registered provider of social housing operating in England, specifically in Buckinghamshire, Oxfordshire, and South Northamptonshire. Since it involves compliance with standards set by the regulatory body for social housing, which primarily oversees landlords in England, it applies to England.
